selected.reason: Direct 1D TP4 fit with one exact packed rank-candidate gather, fixed batch-32 state, stable tt_out_tok, and trace-compatible caller-owned parameters and seeds.

rejected.disposition: source-contract rejection; no misleading non-equivalent hardware benchmark

blockers.reason: With max_top_k=32 it derives one gather link instead of the required two.
Explicit request seeds copy H2D every token and disable internal trace replay.
FullModelConfig does not implement the legacy sampler's required args interface.

p300_limitations: on-device logprobs are unsupported on four devices
penalty accumulator update is outside the internal sampling trace

selected.path: exact local argmax plus packed FP32 rank-candidate gather

rejected.reason: Same greedy token, but slower eager and requires a full-logits collective.
